verdict: The AI displacement risk for Product Managers is moderate, with some tasks becoming more routine and automated.

reasoning_steps.title: Routine Cognitive Tasks
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks like identifying marketing strategy, developing pricing strategies, and analyzing financial aspects of product development are becoming more routine and can be automated by AI.

reasoning_steps.title: Creative Judgment
reasoning_steps.body: While some creative judgment is required in product management, tasks like initiating market research studies or consulting with legal staff to resolve problems are not as heavily reliant on human creativity.

adjacent_careers.name: Marketing Specialist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Marketing specialists focus on specific marketing channels, whereas product managers oversee the entire marketing strategy.

adjacent_careers.name: Product Specialist
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Product specialists work closely with product managers to develop and launch products, but their scope is narrower.

recent_developments.headline: Google Launches AI-Powered Marketing Platform
recent_developments.impact: This platform uses machine learning to analyze customer behavior and optimize marketing campaigns.

recent_developments.headline: AI coding assistants see broad enterprise adoption
recent_developments.impact: Major firms report 25–30% of new code is now AI-generated and reviewed by engineers.

quotes.quote: Software engineering will be very different by the end of 2025. Most code will be written by AI, with human engineers reviewing and directing.
quotes.speaker: Dario Amodei
quotes.title: CEO, Anthropic

quotes.quote: AI is going to be the biggest technological shift of our lifetimes. Bigger than mobile, bigger than the web. Inside Microsoft, more than 30 percent of the code in some projects is now written by AI.
quotes.speaker: Satya Nadella
quotes.title: CEO, Microsoft

quotes.quote: More than a quarter of new code at Google is generated by AI, then reviewed and accepted by engineers.
quotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai
quotes.title: CEO, Google / Alphabet
